prompt: A Swiss International Typographic Style poster depicting class imbalance as a large dense cluster of identical black circles dominating the composition while a few small red circles are isolated and scattered far apart, strict grid-based layout, asymmetric balance, clean sans-serif typography style but no actual text, flat design, high contrast, minimal color palette (black, white, red), precise alignment, lots of negative space, geometric clarity, no gradients, no shadows, no 3D elements
tradition_approach: Used strict grid layout, asymmetric composition, minimal color palette, sans-serif visual logic, and strong figure-ground contrast to reflect imbalance through spatial dominance.
